methods.description: Process for measuring the size distribution of micropalaeontological samples to detect periods of increased growth and/or reproduction.

steps.description: High-resolution images (3648*2736 pixels) of all micropalaeontological slides were taken with a stereomicroscope (Leica S9i, 10x magnification).
steps.searchable_summary: capture high-resolution images of micropalaeontological slides using a stereomicroscope

steps.description: Individual measurements were processed using ImageJ software.
steps.searchable_summary: process individual measurements using ImageJ software

steps.description: Each individual was isolated and its maximum diameter was measured (i.e. Feret's diameter).
steps.searchable_summary: measure maximum diameter of each individual using Feret's diameter

steps.description: Size distributions were represented using histograms with 20 µm classes.
steps.searchable_summary: create histograms of size distributions with 20 µm classes

steps.description: Identify approximate mode for Gaussian curves using changes in slope of the second-order derivative of the total size distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: identify mode of Gaussian curves using second-order derivative

methods.description: Procedure for collecting sediment cores and measuring environmental parameters at two sites in the Den Osse Basin of Lake Grevelingen.

steps.description: Sediment cores were collected monthly in 2012 using a single core gravity corer (UWITEC, Austria) with PVC core liners.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment cores using a gravity corer

steps.description: All cores were inspected upon retrieval and only visually undisturbed sediment cores were used for further analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: inspect and select visually undisturbed sediment cores

steps.description: Oxygen penetration depth (OPD) and depth of free H2S detection were determined using profiling microsensors.
steps.searchable_summary: measure OPD and H2S depth using profiling microsensors

steps.description: For each replicate, the uppermost centimetre (0-1 cm) of the core was transferred to a vial with seawater and labelled with CellTracker™ Green CMFDA.
steps.searchable_summary: transfer core top to vial, add seawater, and label with CellTracker™ Green CMFDA

steps.description: Samples were fixed in 5% sodium borate buffered formalin after 24 h of incubation in the dark.
steps.searchable_summary: fix samples in sodium borate buffered formalin after incubation
